rateBases.tariffNotes:
Rate Notes:

Hotel Tariff Notes:
Compulsory Tourism Dirham to be paid by guest directly to the hotel per room per night valid from 31st March 2014 Onward. No show and early departure will be subjected to 100% charge.No date,name and room change allowed. Bookings including children will be based on sharing parents bedding, no separate bed for children is provided unless otherwise stated. Early check in and late check-out will be charged at 100% of the applicable room rate, and has to be requested in advance. Early Departure of the Guest(s) will subject to Full length of stay booked will be charged.

Check-in for Taj club rooms & Suites will be done at the main reception at the lobby.
Existing reservation cannot be cancelled and rebooked under lower promotion.
Half board supplement cannot be applied on 31 DEC and 1 JAN

*NOTE: Hotels' Restaurant Treehouse, Tesoro and Miss Tes are closed and breakfast is served in the Opera ballroom during this time. (22/05/2023-30/09/2023)
Please note guests are not allowed to cancel existing bookings and rebook. The hotel has the right to reject the booking.
The Tourism Dirham Fee charged per room per night is applicable when booking guest rooms & suites and it will be collected directly at the property and is not reflected in the room rate.
